transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hey, is this Amir? I'm calling from Wati.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Yeah, who's this?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Ryan, from Wati. We're a WhatsApp Business platform. I wanted to quickly walk you through what we offer because I think it'd be a great fit for your business.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Okay, I have a few minutes. What is it exactly?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: So Wati is the number one WhatsApp Business API platform. We let you send bulk messages, automate conversations with chatbots, and manage all your WhatsApp chats from one dashboard. We have over 10,000 customers globally, and we're an official Meta partner.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Okay, but what would I use it for specifically? We're a real estate agency.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Real estate is actually one of our top verticals. You can use it to send property listings to your contact list, automate lead qualification, set up appointment booking — the whole nine yards. We even have pre-built templates for real estate.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I mean, we already use WhatsApp Business app for talking to clients. What's the advantage of switching?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: The API gives you way more power. Unlimited broadcasts, chatbots, multi-agent inbox, analytics — the basic app can't do any of that. Plus you get the green tick verification which builds trust with your clients. Every serious business is moving to the API.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Green tick sounds nice but honestly we're a team of four agents and things are working okay right now. I'm not sure we need all those features.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Trust me, once you see the chatbot automation, you'll wonder how you lived without it. We had a real estate company in Dubai that doubled their lead conversion after switching to Wati. The ROI basically pays for itself.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Doubled? That seems like a stretch. What were they doing before?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: They were using the basic app like you. Look, the point is, the API is just objectively better. There's no reason not to upgrade. And we're running a promotion right now — 20% off the first three months if you sign up this week.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I don't really respond to pressure tactics. And you haven't even asked me what our challenges are or how many messages we handle. How do you know this is the right fit?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Fair point. I mean, every business benefits from better WhatsApp tools. But yeah, how many messages do you guys handle per day?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Maybe 30-40. It's manageable. Our issue is more about lead follow-up — we lose track of who we've spoken to and when to follow up.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yeah so our CRM tagging and contact management features would help with that. You can tag leads, set reminders, all of that.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Okay, I'll think about it. Can you send me some more information?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I'll send you some stuff. What's the best way to reach you?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Just email me at amir@skylinerealty.com.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Cool, I'll shoot that over. And keep in mind the promo ends Friday, so try to decide before then. Alright?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Yeah, okay. Thanks.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Awesome, talk soon. Bye.
